recommendations.title: Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: Roberto Benigni adapts the classic children's tale by Carlo Collodi for the big-budget family-oriented comedy Pinocchio.

recommendations.title: Nothing Left to Do But Cry
recommendations.overview: Two 20th-century friends accidentally stumble into the year 1492, where they meet a charming teen and try to alter history.

recommendations.title: Johnny Stecchino

recommendations.title: The Amazing Maurice
recommendations.overview: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of self-taught talking rats. When Maurice and the rodents meet a bookworm called Malicia, their little con soon goes down the drain.

recommendations.title: Venus

recommendations.title: The Omen
recommendations.overview: Immediately after their miscarriage, the US diplomat Robert Thorn adopts the newborn Damien without the knowledge of his wife. Yet what he doesn’t know is that their new son is the son of the devil.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Will
